---
title: "Contract B v2 — independent refusal example"
subtitle: "Synthetic-only normative draft; no scientific method or promotion rule selected"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    standalone: true
    theme: cosmo
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

::: {.callout-important}
This page is a structural contract demonstration, not model evidence. The
contract and verifier are unreleased repository-only drafts outside repository
package version 0.2.0. The inferential basis and enforcing test, replication policy, and
practical-benefit threshold remain undecided and unauthorized, so the only
permitted outcome is `NOT_EVALUABLE`.
:::

```{python}
#| output: asis
import sys
from pathlib import Path

start = Path.cwd().resolve()
root = next(
    (
        candidate
        for candidate in (start, *start.parents)
        if (candidate / "analysis" / "contract_v2" / "verification.py").is_file()
        and (
            candidate
            / "evidence"
            / "contract-v2"
            / "synthetic-not-evaluable.json"
        ).is_file()
    ),
    None,
)
if root is None:
    raise RuntimeError("repository root for Contract B v2 report not found")
sys.path.insert(0, str(root))

from analysis.contract_v2 import verify_exact_bytes
from analysis.contract_v2.report import render_markdown

evidence = root / "evidence" / "contract-v2" / "synthetic-not-evaluable.json"
verified = verify_exact_bytes(evidence.read_bytes())
print(render_markdown(verified.human_report, evidence_sha256=verified.evidence_sha256))
```
